Je vous remercie par avance pour votre attention et votre disponibilité.	Cordialement,		Paolo Abis.

subject: Palma de Mallorca
message: Good afternoon,		My name is Gary, from MTSea Water Systems based in Palma de Mallorca.		I was thinking that we could explore the possibility of working together.		MTSea Water Systems are the EU distributor for Spot Zero, the manufacturer of the Spot Zero Mobile Pro, the most effective mobile reverse osmosis water purifier on the market, the Spot Zero Mobile Pro (please see attached PDF).		Given the significant investment your clients make in high-quality paintwork, maintaining that finish is essential. As you know, Mallorca\'s water is extremely hard, with high levels of calcium and magnesium. When washdowns are carried out using unpurified water, these minerals can create micro-scratches during chamoising, which reduces the lifespan and appearance of the paintwork.		For example, the water in STP from the dock typically has a TDS (total dissolved solids) of around 500ppm, with the Mobile Pro this would drop below 50 PPM, giving your clients a streak-free, without water marks or scratches finish after washdowns, without the need to chamois.		I believe that if you were to recommend the Spot Zero Mobile Pro to your clients after painting, it would be extremely beneficial. They invest heavily in achieving a high-quality paint finish, and this system helps them maintain that finish in the most effective way.		This partnership could also be financially mutually beneficial, and I would be happy to discuss the details with you if this is of interest/		Please let me know if you would like to explore this further. I would be glad to arrange a meeting and provide a full proposal and a demo of the Spot Zero Mobile Pro.		Many thanks,

subject: Telaga
message: Hello!		I’m currently based in Kuah, Langkawi and I’m looking to buy an inflatable dinghy (tender) for my 28ft sailboat.		Could you please let me know if you have any suitable dinghies available (new or good used ones)?	What I’m looking for:		* Length: ideally 2.5–2.7m (I’m usually alone, but sometimes with some groceries/gear)	* Must have a proper transom for an outboard motor	* Prefer AirDeck / high-pressure floor + inflatable keel (for better ride and stability)	* 3 air chambers + keel preferred for safety	* Suitable for a 5hp outboard engine		If you have models in stock, could you please share:		* Brand/model and price (RM)	* Weight and maximum HP rating	* What is included (oars, pump, seat, repair kit, carry bag)	* Delivery/pickup options in Kuah or around Langkawi		Thank you!	Best regards,	Alex

I am eager to contribute to the unique unforgettable experiences your yacht offers to guests from around the world.  Thank you for considering my application. subject: male\'
message: Hello Again,		I hope this message finds you well. I’d like to formally introduce Solara, our 23-meter modern, solar-powered yacht designed for unforgettable experiences at sea. Solara blends comfort, performance, and sustainability, making it ideal for luxury charters, fishing, surfing, diving, or bespoke adventures.		Key Features:		Length: 23 m | Breadth: 6.33 m | Depth: 3.35 m		Cruise Speed: 12 knots | Engine: 1 x 500 HP YAMMA Marine diesel		Solar System: 5.7 kV with battery pack for eco-friendly cruising		Passenger Capacity: 35		Onboard Comfort: 5 rooms, 7 AC units, dining area, kitchen, and food & drink service counter		Adventure Ready: Fully equipped for water sports and charter experiences		Self-Sufficient: 6,500 L fuel, 3,000 L water, 10-ton/day RO plant, advanced bilge and alarm systems		You can explore more details about Solara and our offerings on our website: https://www.solaramaldives.com		We are currently looking for a trusted partner agency to help market and sell Solara. We would love to explore potential collaboration opportunities with you, including arranging a vessel inspection at your convenience.		Looking forward to your thoughts and hoping we can work together on this exciting project.			Best Regards	Gene	+960-746-9981

subject: Beef Island
message: Good day		I would like to place an order with you. Do you have an email address that I can contact you on?

Dear team,		I am reaching out today on the off chance that you might know someone who needs a personal trainer / physical therapist or an extra team member ( entry-level crew position ) aboard yachts where I can leverage my background in fitness, physical therapy, and high-performance athletics to enhance guest experiences and support operations.		I grew up competing as a professional gymnast from 2003 to 2015, pushing through national and international events where every day demanded total discipline, mental toughness and the ability to perform under intense pressure. That world taught me how to stay calm when things get chaotic, adapt on the fly, and keep pushing even when exhausted, skills I know are essential for the long hours and team life on a yacht. As an FIG Elite Coach during that time, I also mentored athletes, which built my knack for motivating people and reading what they need to succeed.		Since 2015, I\'ve been working full-time as a personal trainer and physical therapist around the globe. I create custom programs that mix strength, flexibility, endurance, and functional work, always tailored to where the client is at, whether they\'re beginners, advanced, young, or older. I incorporate sports massage, stretching, and mindset coaching to help with recovery and long-term progress. I\'ve handled busy seasons with back-to-back sessions, kept everything safe and injury-free and built real connections with clients so they keep coming back feeling stronger and more confident. One thing I\'m proud of is how I\'ve stayed flexible, no pun intended, adapting routines to whatever space or equipment is available, which I imagine is exactly what you\'d need on a yacht deck, swim platform, or small gym setup.		What draws me to yachting is the chance to combine that wellness side with real adventure and service. I love the idea of helping guests feel their best during charters, whether it\'s a sunrise stretch session, a post-dive recovery massage, or just keeping motivation high on long passages. I\'m fully aware I\'m new to the maritime side but my physical capability, calm under pressure and willingness to jump into any role (deck work included) mean I can learn fast and add value right away. subject: Barcelona
message: Good afternoon,		I’m sorry to message you out of the blue! I’m writing to ask if there’s any way you’d be interested in taking on a new employee.		I have carpentry and building experience. I worked as an assistant to the natural builder SunRay Kelley in America, on projects that were later featured in the New York Times. I’ve also worked as a carpenter’s assistant on housing and industrial projects in Canada, and in various roles that demanded practical skills.		I have a great drive to learn and a strong work ethic. I’m also physically fit, energetic, personable, and proficient in Spanish (and fluent in English). I’m careful, with an eye for attention to detail, and I always take great pride in my work. I have strong interpersonal skills, and am able to deal with a diverse range of customers. I also love the ocean, and anything to do with it. I’d be delighted to receive an opportunity to devote myself to nautical carpentry. And, of course, I’m a Barcelona resident with the right to work in Spain.		Since my last carpentry work I’ve been working as a writer and researcher for the University of Oxford, where I earned my postgraduate degree. I also spent last year writing a non-fiction book for a publisher in California, which will be released later this year. My academic career has gone well, but in pursuing it, I’ve found a need to work with my hands. I want to approach carpentry with the same dedication that made me successful as a writer.		If you have any time or space to discuss, I’d love to talk over the phone or in person about how I could contribute. I’m also happy to provide references, or to prove myself on a job.		If you don’t have any space right now but know anybody that does, I’d be really grateful if you could pass my details along. And if not, no problem! Thanks for reading either way, and I hope you’re having a great start to the new year.		Cheers,		Charlie

The boat is 11.70 m long, 3.70 m wide, with a draft of 2.40 m and a weight of approximately 8 tons.  	I am planning a 7‑day haul‑out period around mid‑March 2026.	Could you please let me know whether it is possible to live on board during this period while the boat is out of the water?		Could you also provide the contact details of companies that can carry out the hull maintenance work (sanding, antifouling application)?		Thank you in advance for your response.		Best regards	François Connilhere	\"Soleil Le Vent\"

subject: Miami
message: Good afternoon,I am Alessandro Balducci Vendor Manager of Love to Italy based in Miami Fl.Nice to meet you!		​We are clearing our warehouse of select boutique Italian wines from small-scale producers who craft no more than 15,000 bottles annually. These are high-quality, artisanal labels currently in their perfect drinking window, with about two years of peak life remaining.		​If you purchase the entire stock, we can offer a drastic price reduction. This is a unique opportunity to secure rare, small-batch inventory at an unbeatable rate.		​Best regards,		Alessandro Balducci 		7869686737

message: Dear Captain / Hiring Manager,	I am writing to express my interest in a Deck/Stew position aboard your yacht. With formal maritime training, strong hospitality experience, and a background in private household service, I bring a well-rounded skill set suited to both interior and exterior responsibilities.	I hold valid STCW and ENG1 certifications, along with RYA Powerboat Level 2 and Jet Ski proficiency. I am confident supporting deck operations including washdowns, detailing, tender driving, and guest water-sport activities, while also maintaining high interior standards. My land-based experience in luxury residential communities, fine dining service, and private childcare has strengthened my attention to detail, professionalism, and ability to anticipate guest needs.	Working as a Community Consultant managing a 600+ resident property refined my organizational skills and ability to remain calm and solution-focused in fast-paced environments. My fine-dining background developed my understanding of high-level service, presentation, and teamwork, while my private household experience reinforced discretion and adaptability.	I take pride in maintaining immaculate standards, contributing positively to crew dynamics, and ensuring guests feel safe, comfortable, and exceptionally well cared for. I am hardworking, dependable, and eager to continue growing within the yachting industry.	Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to further discuss how I can contribute to your vessel and crew.	Kind regards,	Genesis Cross	+44 7405 733 232	Genesiscross19@gmail.com

subject: ANTIBES
message: Vos besoins en matière de bières — dites-nous ce que vous préférez !		Madame, Monsieur,			Nous sommes BEERSHOP06, société spécialisée dans la bières et vins et basée à Antibes en France. Dans le cadre de l\'optimisation de vos approvisionnements pour la saison 2026, nous réalisont une étude sélective auprès des sociétés d\'approvisionnement, des gestionnaires de propriétés et yachts de prestige, acteur majeur de l\'événementiel.		L\'objectif est de concevoir une offre qui répond aux attentes de votre clientèle exigeante :			Nous souhaitons mieux répondre à vos attentes concernant nos produits bières. Pourriez‑vous prendre 2–3 minutes pour nous indiquer vos besoins ? Vos retours guideront nos choix de gamme, conditionnement et promotions.		Questions (à répondre par retour de mail) :		 		1.      Quelles familles de bières consomment le plus vos clients ? (pils, lager, IPA, stout, blanche, fruitée, sours, artisanales, sans alcool, sans gluten...)		2.      Quelles sont les marques et pays ?		3.      Avez‑vous des préférences de format ? (canette 33cl/44cl, bouteille 33cl/50cl, fût, pack)		4.      Quelle quantité pour chaque produit ? Quel volume moyen (en litres ou caisses, cartons palettes) commandez-vous par mois en haute et basse saison ?		5.      Quelle fourchette de prix vous semble raisonnable pour une bière ?		6.      Achetez‑vous surtout en magasin, en ligne, ou grossiste ? En France ou à l’étranger ?		7.      Quels critères influencent le plus votre choix ? (goût, provenance, label bio, alcoolémie, prix, design)		8.      Quels sont les délais d’approvisionnement ? Quel niveau de réactivité attendez-vous pour une livraison (H+4, J+1, Hebdomadaire) ?		9.      Quelle est la demande \"client\" que vous avez du mal à satisfaire actuellement ?		10. Recevez-vous des demandes pour des bières sans alcool (0.0%) de qualité gastronomique ?		11. Recevez-vous des demandes pour des bières sans gluten ?		12. Quels moyens de communication vous sont le plus adaptés pour passer commande ? téléphone, email, site Internet marchand, application mobile sur téléphone mobile ?		13. Suggestions / commentaires libres : ___		 		Merci de votre collaboration.		Veuillez agréer, Madame, Monsieur, l’expression de mes salutations distinguées.		Cordialement		G.BIETRY

Dans le cadre de l\'optimisation de vos approvisionnements pour la saison 2026, nous réalisont une étude sélective auprès des sociétés d\'approvisionnement, des gestionnaires de propriétés et yachts de prestige, acteur majeur de l\'événementiel.		L\'objectif est de concevoir une offre qui répond aux attentes de votre clientèle exigeante :			Nous souhaitons mieux répondre à vos attentes concernant nos produits bières. Pourriez‑vous prendre 2–3 minutes pour nous indiquer vos besoins ? Vos retours guideront nos choix de gamme, conditionnement et promotions.		Questions (à répondre par retour de mail) :		 		1.      Quelles familles de bières consomment le plus vos clients ? (pils, lager, IPA, stout, blanche, fruitée, sours, artisanales, sans alcool, sans gluten...)		2.      Quelles sont les marques et pays ?		3.      Avez‑vous des préférences de format ? (canette 33cl/44cl, bouteille 33cl/50cl, fût, pack)		4.      Quelle quantité pour chaque produit ? Quel volume moyen (en litres ou caisses, cartons palettes) commandez-vous par mois en haute et basse saison ?		5.      Quelle fourchette de prix vous semble raisonnable pour une bière ?		6.      Achetez‑vous surtout en magasin, en ligne, ou grossiste ? En France ou à l’étranger ?		7.      Quels critères influencent le plus votre choix ? (goût, provenance, label bio, alcoolémie, prix, design)		8.      Quels sont les délais d’approvisionnement ? Quel niveau de réactivité attendez-vous pour une livraison (H+4, J+1, Hebdomadaire) ?		9.      Quelle est la demande \"client\" que vous avez du mal à satisfaire actuellement ?		10. Recevez-vous des demandes pour des bières sans alcool (0.0%) de qualité gastronomique ?		11. Recevez-vous des demandes pour des bières sans gluten ?		12. Quels moyens de communication vous sont le plus adaptés pour passer commande ? téléphone, email, site Internet marchand, application mobile sur téléphone mobile ?		13. Suggestions / commentaires libres : ___		 		Merci de votre collaboration.		Veuillez agréer, Madame, Monsieur, l’expression de mes salutations distinguées.		Cordialement		G.BIETRY

L\'objectif est de concevoir une offre qui répond aux attentes de votre clientèle exigeante :			Nous souhaitons mieux répondre à vos attentes concernant nos produits bières. Pourriez‑vous prendre 2–3 minutes pour nous indiquer vos besoins ? Vos retours guideront nos choix de gamme, conditionnement et promotions.		Questions (à répondre par retour de mail) :		 		1.      Quelles familles de bières consomment le plus vos clients ? (pils, lager, IPA, stout, blanche, fruitée, sours, artisanales, sans alcool, sans gluten...)		2.      Quelles sont les marques et pays ?		3.      Avez‑vous des préférences de format ? (canette 33cl/44cl, bouteille 33cl/50cl, fût, pack)		4.      Quelle quantité pour chaque produit ? Quel volume moyen (en litres ou caisses, cartons palettes) commandez-vous par mois en haute et basse saison ?		5.      Quelle fourchette de prix vous semble raisonnable pour une bière ?		6.      Achetez‑vous surtout en magasin, en ligne, ou grossiste ? En France ou à l’étranger ?		7.      Quels critères influencent le plus votre choix ? (goût, provenance, label bio, alcoolémie, prix, design)		8.      Quels sont les délais d’approvisionnement ? Quel niveau de réactivité attendez-vous pour une livraison (H+4, J+1, Hebdomadaire) ?		9.      Quelle est la demande \"client\" que vous avez du mal à satisfaire actuellement ?		10. Recevez-vous des demandes pour des bières sans alcool (0.0%) de qualité gastronomique ?		11. Recevez-vous des demandes pour des bières sans gluten ?		12. Quels moyens de communication vous sont le plus adaptés pour passer commande ? téléphone, email, site Internet marchand, application mobile sur téléphone mobile ?		13. Suggestions / commentaires libres : ___		 		Merci de votre collaboration.		Veuillez agréer, Madame, Monsieur, l’expression de mes salutations distinguées.		Cordialement		G.BIETRY

L\'objectif est de concevoir une offre qui répond aux attentes de votre clientèle exigeante :			Nous souhaitons mieux répondre à vos attentes concernant nos produits bières. Pourriez‑vous prendre 2–3 minutes pour nous indiquer vos besoins ? Vos retours guideront nos choix de gamme, conditionnement et promotions.		Questions (à répondre par retour de mail) :		 		1.      Quelles familles de bières consomment le plus vos clients ? (pils, lager, IPA, stout, blanche, fruitée, sours, artisanales, sans alcool, sans gluten...)		2.      Quelles sont les marques et pays ?		3.      Avez‑vous des préférences de format ? (canette 33cl/44cl, bouteille 33cl/50cl, fût, pack)		4.      Quelle quantité pour chaque produit ? Quel volume moyen (en litres ou caisses, cartons palettes) commandez-vous par mois en haute et basse saison ?		5.      Quelle fourchette de prix vous semble raisonnable pour une bière ?		6.      Achetez‑vous surtout en magasin, en ligne, ou grossiste ? En France ou à l’étranger ?		7.      Quels critères influencent le plus votre choix ? (goût, provenance, label bio, alcoolémie, prix, design)		8.      Quels sont les délais d’approvisionnement ? subject: Fort Lauderdale Florida
message: Dear Captain / Hiring Manager,	I am writing to express my interest in a Deck/Stew position aboard your yacht. With formal maritime training, strong hospitality experience, and a background in private household service, I bring a well-rounded skill set suited to both interior and exterior responsibilities.	I hold valid STCW and ENG1 certifications, along with RYA Powerboat Level 2 and Jet Ski proficiency. I am confident supporting deck operations including washdowns, detailing, tender driving, and guest water-sport activities, while also maintaining high interior standards. My land-based experience in luxury residential communities, fine dining service, and private childcare has strengthened my attention to detail, professionalism, and ability to anticipate guest needs.	Working as a Community Consultant managing a 600+ resident property refined my organizational skills and ability to remain calm and solution-focused in fast-paced environments. My fine-dining background developed my understanding of high-level service, presentation, and teamwork, while my private household experience reinforced discretion and adaptability.	I take pride in maintaining immaculate standards, contributing positively to crew dynamics, and ensuring guests feel safe, comfortable, and exceptionally well cared for. I am hardworking, dependable, and eager to continue growing within the yachting industry.	Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to further discuss how I can contribute to your vessel and crew.	Kind regards,	Genesis Cross	WhatsApp: +1 346 508 4678 	Genesiscross19@gmail.com

message: Dear Captain / Hiring Manager,	I am writing to express my interest in a Deck/Stew position aboard your yacht. subject: Bolzano Italy
message: Dear Sir or Madam,	In the field of luxury yacht construction and high-end interior design, exceptional materials and flawless surface finishes play a decisive role in creating truly unique environments. In this context, I would like to introduce a new and unique finishing technology that opens completely new possibilities for exclusive interior applications.	We specialize in real 24-karat gold coatings with a perfect mirror finish. Unlike traditional gold leaf or electroplating processes, this technology produces a completely homogeneous and highly reflective surface made of genuine gold, which can also be applied to non-conductive materials and complex geometries.	A key advantage of this innovation is the ability to apply real 24K gold to components of virtually any size — including large and elongated parts — independently of geometry or dimensions. This makes it possible to realize applications that were previously not feasible with conventional galvanic processes.	Our technology enables:	• real 24K gold with perfect mirror reflection	• size-independent coating of small to very large components	• application on lacquered surfaces, plastics, wood, stone, metal and composite materials	• realization on complex geometries and elongated elements	• precision craftsmanship for bespoke pieces and small series	• optional on-site execution worldwide	• high durability through protective clear coating systems	A particularly interesting aspect is the ability to coat flexible materials such as leather or artificial leather with real 24K gold — elastic, reflective and durable — opening new possibilities for interior elements and decorative features.	The technology is ideally suited for yacht interiors, architectural elements, furniture components, decorative features and exclusive owner requests where extraordinary materials are desired.	If this topic is of interest to you, I would be delighted to provide samples or demonstration surfaces and discuss potential applications together.	Thank you very much for your time and consideration.	Kind regards	Istvan Horvat	24 K Vergoldungszentrum	Gold finishing center:	CARMETER	Handwerkerzone 44	39054 Klobenstein/Renon (Bolzano)	Italia - Süd Tirol	MwSt: IT 02827750213	EK: XS9WT43	 	www.chromlack.de 	www.carmeter.it

message: Hello,		I am looking for a transport quotation for a sailing yacht from Lelystad, Netherlands to Port-Saint-Louis-du-Rhone, France.		The boat model is an Albin Ballad 30 with the following technical data:		LOA: 9.25 m	Beam: 2.96 m (Oversize Load)	Weight: Approx. 3,500 kg	Mast length: Approx. 11.50 m	Total height on trailer: Approx. 3.40 m (Draft 1.55 m + Hull height)		I would like to have a quotation for the trip.		If possible, I would like to take advantage of a return load (backload) to reduce costs. Please let me know if this is feasible and how we can coordinate the timing to match one of your empty return trips.		Do you also provide support or coordination for hauling/loading in Lelystad and unloading/launching in France, including unstepping and stepping the mast?		I look forward to your reply.		Best regards,		Marco

subject: Chania,Crete
message: Subject: Registration for 2nd Officer / OOW Positions - Fanourios Raptakis		Dear Maximus Yacht Crew Team,		I am reaching out to express my interest in registering with your agency for Deck Officer (OOW / 2nd Officer) positions aboard motor yachts and superyachts.		I am a Greek Deck Officer holding a Captain Class C Certificate of Competency, with over two years of hands-on experience navigating highly regulated tanker vessels with Minerva Marine. I am currently looking to transition my skill set into the luxury yachting sector.		Coming from the rigorous commercial tanker industry, I bring an uncompromising standard for safety, immaculate navigation (ECDIS Wärtsilä Navi-Sailor), Bridge Team Management, and strict compliance with Safety Management Systems (SMS). I am fully STCW compliant, holding advanced certifications including Ship Security Officer (SSO) and Advanced Fire Fighting. I also have a C2-Level proficiency in English.		I am accustomed to high-pressure environments, maintain a highly professional demeanor, and I am eager to apply my navigational and safety expertise to provide a secure and premium experience for guests on board.		Could you please advise on the best way to formally submit my CV and sea service records for your database?		Thank you for your time, and I look forward to your guidance.		Best regards,		Fanourios Raptakis	2nd Officer / OOW	Phone: +30 6949855562	Email: fanrap11@gmail.com	Location: Heraklion, Crete, Greece

subject: Cape Town
message: I am writing to apply for the position of Sous Chef. I bring seven years of professional yachting experience, having sailed over 12,000 nautical miles, with all maritime certifications fully up to date. In addition, I offer 16 years of international hospitality and management experience across 33 countries, delivering consistently high standards in demanding environments.		I completed my culinary training at the Superyacht Culinary Academy and further developed my skills by staging at a Michelin-starred restaurant in France. My career has included working with UHNW families, A-list celebrities, royalty, politicians, and high-profile principals. I also have experience in television, having hosted a travel and cooking programme in China, received an industry award during my time in Asia, and most recently been a finalist on a national televised cooking and baking competition.		Prior to COVID, I worked for the same company for seven consecutive years, demonstrating reliability, loyalty, and the ability to integrate successfully within established teams. Having grown up in a structured boarding school environment, I am comfortable living and working closely with crew over extended periods.		I am highly organised, adaptable, and professional in my approach, and I thrive in well-run galleys. I am able to support the Head Chef with clear systems in place, including menus, tested recipes, provisioning procedures, hygiene and safety protocols, and budget management. I would welcome the opportunity to contribute positively to the overall operation and guest experience on board.		Thank you for your time and consideration. I would be pleased to discuss my application further at your convenience.		Yours sincerely,	Chantelle Slabbert

As a surveyor, you know that accessing mastheads, hard-to-reach hull sections, and out-of-water structures can be time-consuming and often high-risk. subject: Lidingö
message: Good day,		I am the owner of a small plywood sailing boat, a French design from the 1960s \"Muscadet\".	The boat is 6.4 m in length and 2.10 m in beam.		I am currently considering either a partial refit or a more extensive rebuild, depending on feasibility and cost.		The structure of the boat is sound and not rotten, so the work would mainly involve replacing outer plywood panels rather than structural frames.		The complete rebuild option would consist of:		Removal of the existing plywood deck and hull panels		Installation of new marine plywood panels pre-impregnated with epoxy resin		Assembly using epoxy bonding joints		Full preparation and application of a two-component marine paint system on both hull and deck		If a full rebuild is too expensive, I would also consider a partial refit, including:		Removal and replacement of damaged plywood sections		Re-impregnation of the plywood with epoxy		Full repainting with a two-component marine paint system		The boat is currently located in the Stockholm region (Sweden).	If necessary, I would consider transporting the boat to your yard. If you know a transporter experienced in moving small boats internationally, I would be interested in your recommendation.		Could you please let me know:		Whether this type of work is something your yard can undertake		An approximate price range for both options		Your current waiting time		I can provide photos and additional details if helpful.		Best regards,			Jean-Charles

The complete rebuild option would consist of:		Removal of the existing plywood deck and hull panels		Installation of new marine plywood panels pre-impregnated with epoxy resin		Assembly using epoxy bonding joints		Full preparation and application of a two-component marine paint system on both hull and deck		If a full rebuild is too expensive, I would also consider a partial refit, including:		Removal and replacement of damaged plywood sections		Re-impregnation of the plywood with epoxy		Full repainting with a two-component marine paint system		The boat is currently located in the Stockholm region (Sweden).	If necessary, I would consider transporting the boat to your yard. If you know a transporter experienced in moving small boats internationally, I would be interested in your recommendation.		Could you please let me know:		Whether this type of work is something your yard can undertake		An approximate price range for both options		Your current waiting time		I can provide photos and additional details if helpful.		Best regards,			Jean-Charles

CO.FE.ME Exhaust System is the go to partner for the refitting of marine exhaust gas systems, offering a highly qualified service designed to respond quickly, efficiently, and comprehensively to the needs of engine specialists, marinas, mechanical workshops, and shipyards.	What sets us apart is our rapid problem solving: immediate activity planning to minimize operational impact and the indirect costs associated with downtime.	All interventions are carried out by our in house team, ensuring a single point of contact throughout the entire project.	Our turnkey service covers every stage of the process: from the technical inspection performed by our engineering department—supported by 3D scanners for extremely precise surveys even in complex spaces—to the design, manufacturing, and onboard installation complete with thermal insulation.	Tailor made solutions, perfectly adapted to the needs of your vessel.	CO.FE.ME Exhaust System: customer care and passion for our work. Choose excellence.	We remain at your disposal for any clarification or request.		Best Regards	Silvia Casadei

subject: Rome
message: Dear Team,		My name is Lorenzo Pace, I am 20 years old, and I would like to submit my application for a Deckhand position on board a superyacht.		I am highly motivated to grow professionally in this industry, which strongly appeals to me for its high standards and dynamic, international environment. Through my previous experiences, I have developed key skills such as teamwork, stress management, attention to detail, and a strong service-oriented mindset.		I have completed one season working on board a FLY 620 catamaran SHIDA, where I gained hands-on experience with deck operations, guest interaction, and daily onboard duties. This experience helped me develop adaptability, responsibility, and initiative.		I hold the STCW certification and a nautical license (within 12 miles, sail and motor). I also have an English level of B2, which allows me to communicate effectively and professionally in international environments.		I consider myself a reliable, flexible, and hardworking person. I am eager to learn, maintain a positive attitude, and integrate quickly into a team.		I would be very enthusiastic to join your network and contribute with commitment and professionalism on board.		I am available for any further information and would welcome the opportunity for an interview.		Thank you for your time and consideration.		Kind regards,	Lorenzo Pace	3920135525

subject: Teolo (PD) - Italy
message: Bonjour, 	Nous sommes une entreprise italienne spécialisée dans la création et la production de spectacles et d\'événements live à fort impact, qui opère à l\'échelle internationale en présentant nos performances dans de nombreux pays. Au fil des ans, nous avons réalisé des projets artistiques pour des organismes publics et privés, des événements d\'entreprise, des inaugurations, des mariages, des cérémonies sportives, des productions télévisées, des festivals et de grands événements artistiques.	Nous aimerons vous envoyer la présentation de notre entreprise et des spectacles que nous proposons. Tous les spectacles peuvent être personnalisés avec le logo et les couleurs de votre ville ou clients, adaptés à différents contextes et, pour certains d\'entre eux, réalisés dans une version de Noël.	Nous serions très heureux d\'organiser un événement dans votre ville et restons donc à votre disposition pour toute question ou demande.		Cordialement	Jessica Rossetto

subject: Olbia
message: Bonjour,		Je vous contacte dans le cadre d’un projet de partenariat pour la saison été 2026 en Sardaigne et sur le Sud de la France.		Je développe une activité de cours premium (boxe, self-défense, préparation physique et gestion du stress) destinée à une clientèle internationale haut de gamme, intégrable directement dans des hôtels, resorts ou structures de conciergerie.		L’objectif est de proposer une expérience sport & bien-être directement sur site, afin d’enrichir l’offre existante et de renforcer la valeur des séjours proposés à vos clients.		Concrètement, je peux intervenir à la demande pour des cours privés ou petits groupes (clients, familles, séjours premium).		Dans le cadre de ce partenariat, je recherche un fonctionnement simple et flexible, par exemple :		- mise à disposition d’un logement pour ma famille (ma femme, mon fils et moi), ce qui me permet d’être présent sur place de manière régulière,	- pension ou demi-pension selon les possibilités,	- et un modèle économique adaptable : soit facturation directe de mes prestations avec une rétrocession à définir, soit intégration de mes services dans votre offre client.		Je reste totalement ouvert à la manière de structurer la collaboration en fonction de votre organisation et de ce qui est le plus cohérent pour vous.		L’idée est de construire un partenariat durable et évolutif, car j’ai pour objectif de m’installer progressivement sur place dans les prochaines années et de développer une activité locale stable.		Ma femme étant d’origine sarde, et ayant également des attaches familiales sur l’île, ce projet a aussi une dimension personnelle forte : retrouver les racines pour ma famille et permettre à notre fils de grandir dans cet environnement.		Je parle français et anglais, et j’apprends l’italien afin de m’intégrer pleinement dans le tissu local et professionnel.		Si le concept peut vous intéresser, je serais ravi d’en discuter plus en détail.		Et si cela peut correspondre à certains de vos partenaires ou contacts, je serais également preneur de mises en relation avec votre accord.		Bien à vous,	Kévin Coudry	+33 6 98 80 81

Je souhaiterais donc savoir :		* quelles formations vous recommandez pour une débutante ;	* quels permis ou certificats sont reconnus à l’international (France, Grèce, Italie, etc.) ;	* si vous proposez des formations de type RYA, ICC ou équivalent ;	* combien de temps dure généralement la formation ;	* et s’il est possible de commencer rapidement.		Je suis également intéressée par une formation sérieuse et pratique afin d’apprendre réellement la navigation et la sécurité en mer.		Je vous remercie par avance pour votre retour et reste disponible pour toute information complémentaire.		Bien cordialement,

Listing Name: Evolution Yacht Agents | Yacht Agent Spain, Gibraltar & Portugal
subject: Spain
message: Dear Team,		I hope this email finds you well.	I am a Venezuelan merchant mariner with 15 years of total maritime experience (10 years in the merchant navy and 5 years working specifically on yachts). While I have normally worked onboard vessels under foreign flags, I am currently in talks for a position as Deck/Stew onboard a commercial yacht currently located in Spain, flying the Portuguese Flag (MAR). Accordingly, the employment will be under a Portuguese contract in line with the vessel\'s registry.		The contract being offered is fully legal, including comprehensive medical insurance, full room and board (living onboard with all expenses covered), and a duration of approximately three months for this season. However, there are ongoing discussions to continue working with them every summer on a long-term basis. Regarding the vessel\'s current itinerary, my embarkation would take place in Spain, and its final work destination will be Greece.		As a non-EU citizen, I would like to consult with your agency regarding the minimum immigration and legal requirements needed for my official enrollment under a Portuguese flag and contract, given this specific route, my current status, and our future long-term plans.		For your reference, these are the documents I hold:		✔️Valid Biometric Venezuelan Passport (Visa-exempt for entry into the EU).	✔️UK Seaman’s Book & Venezuelan Seaman’s Book.	✔️Valid ENG1 Medical Certificate.	✔️Valid STCW Basic Safety Training ✔️Certificates (and related Stew/Interior courses).		Could you please advise us on the exact requirements or procedures mandated by maritime and border authorities for a non-EU seafarer with my profile to legally sign on to the vessel in Spain under these conditions? Does your agency provide assistance for crew embarkation and customs/immigration clearance for MAR-flagged yachts?		Thank you very much for your time and guidance.		Best regards,	Anilyn Alvarez

subject: St Jean de Losne, France
message: Bonjour		J\'ai été orienté vers vous par H2O Saint-Jean-de-Losne.	Notre bateau est bloqué dans le port de Roanne suite à la fermeture du canal de Roanne a Digoin.	J\'enquête s\'il est possible de le déplacer depuis Briennon à Saint-Jean-de-Losne et aussi quel en serait le coût.		En septembre il y aura une grue au Port de Briennon qui levera plusieurs bateaux pour les peindre. Alors ils peuvent peut-être aussi mettre un bateau sur un camion. Je suis en train de vérifier.		À St-Jean de Losne, H2O peut enlever le bateau du camion.		Pouvez vous me dire si vous pouvez transporter le bateau entre Briennon et St-Jean de Losne et le tarif?		Notre bateau est un croiseur en acier de 14,2 m de long et 4,25 m de large, avec un tirant d\'eau de 1,3 m et un tirant d\'air de 3 m. Il pèse entre 16 et 18 tonnes. Pouvez-vous me dire si vous pouvez m\'aider dans ce domaine ?	 	Cordialement

subject: Antibes
message: PATRICK FABER	Deckhand  |  Maintenance & Detailing  |  Antibes, France	+33 75 908 1191  |  WhatsApp: +27 76 074 8959  |  patricklfaber08@gmail.com  |  Available Immediately			28 May 2026	RE: Deckhand, Shipyard & Maintenance Position	Dear Hiring Manager,	I am writing to express my strong interest in any deckhand, maintenance, or shipyard positions you may have available. I am a 19-year-old South African national, currently based in Antibes and available to start immediately — whether that is day work, a short contract, or a full seasonal role.	I come fully certified and ready to work. My qualifications include STCW 2010 Basic Safety Training, ENG1 medical, RYA Powerboat Level II, RYA PWC (Jet Ski), RYA Radar, RYA Diesel Engine, and SAMSA VHF Marine. I completed a professional Superyacht Deckhand Career Course in Cape Town in 2026, covering efficient deckhand theory, exterior maintenance and detailing, mooring and line handling, and on board hierarchy and safety.	What separates me from many entry-level candidates is five years of real hands-on technical experience. Working part-time in a professional interior installation business, I operated power tools daily — drills, sanders, grinders, and saws — carried out precision fitting and repairs, and maintained rigorous standards inside private client homes. That practical discipline translates directly to the shipyard environment: I understand how to work accurately, work safely, and take care of expensive surroundings.	My recent deckhand daywork at Cape Town Marinas covered yacht washdowns, teak cleaning, stainless steel polishing, chamoising, line handling, docking assistance, and guest-ready presentation — tasks I can carry out to a high standard from day one. I am physically fit (175 cm, 70 kg), a strong swimmer, a non-smoker with no tattoos, and I hold a valid South African passport.	I am exactly where I want to be — Antibes, at the heart of the Mediterranean superyacht industry — and I am committed to building a long-term career here. I am the candidate who turns up on time, works hard, asks the right questions, and does not need to be told twice. I would welcome any opportunity to come in, meet your team, and demonstrate that in person.	Please find my CV attached. I am happy to come to your yard at any time that suits you. Thank you sincerely for your time and consideration.	Kind regards,	Patrick Faber	+33 75 908 1191  |  WhatsApp: +27 76 074 8959	patricklfaber08@gmail.com

subject: Szczecin, Poland
message: Dear Sir or Madam,		I would like to kindly inquire about potential employment opportunities within your company.		I hold a Master of Science in Engineering in Mechanical Engineering and Machine Design, obtained from the Maritime University of Szczecin.	I have professional experience in the maritime and technical sector, including nearly one year in a shipyard as a hull technologist, followed by approximately one year in a diagnostic company performing ultrasonic testing (UT) inspections on vessels during scheduled surveys and maintenance works.	For the past ten years, I have been working in a forensic laboratory within the Police, specializing in anthroposcopic and forensic audio analysis. While I value my current position, I am looking to return to the maritime industry and relocate.	I am particularly interested in roles requiring strong analytical thinking, precision, and attention to detail, such as inspection, quality control, or NDT-related positions. I am open to entry-level or junior roles and fully willing to undergo additional training, certifications, and even learn a new language at my own expense if required.		I would be very grateful if you could consider my CV for any suitable current or future opportunities within your organization.		Thank you very much for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.			Yours faithfully,	Paweł Pinkowski
